description: Multi-agent identity, reputation, and coordination network. Provides the trust layer for autonomous agents: verifiable identity (ERC-8004), reputation scoring, scoped delegation, capability discovery, and ENS integration.

supported_tools.name: registerAgent
supported_tools.description: Register a new agent with name, capabilities, and ENS name on-chain

supported_tools.name: attestCompletion
supported_tools.description: Peer attestation of task completion with score (0-10) — updates reputation

supported_tools.name: getReputation
supported_tools.description: Query agent reputation score, tasks completed, tasks failed, and total attestations

supported_tools.name: discoverAgents
supported_tools.description: Find agents by capability tag and minimum reputation score

supported_tools.name: delegate
supported_tools.description: Grant scoped, time-limited, revocable permissions to another agent

supported_tools.name: isDelegationActive
supported_tools.description: Check if a delegation is still active (not expired or revoked)

supported_tools.name: rank_projects
supported_tools.description: Reputation-weighted public goods project evaluation across legitimacy, impact, and sustainability

supported_tools.name: olas_register_service
supported_tools.description: Register agent as Pearl-compatible autonomous service in Olas ecosystem

supported_tools.name: olas_handle_request
supported_tools.description: Handle service requests with fee validation and SLA tracking

supported_tools.name: openserv_get_reputation
supported_tools.description: Look up on-chain agent reputation via OpenServ multi-agent coordination

supported_tools.name: openserv_discover_agents
supported_tools.description: Find agents by capability and minimum reputation via OpenServ

supported_tools.name: openserv_verify_trust
supported_tools.description: Verify trust threshold before task delegation via OpenServ

supported_tools.name: openserv_evaluate_project
supported_tools.description: Reputation-weighted public goods evaluation via OpenServ multi-agent workflow

multi_agent_features: Task routing between agents in OpenServ workspaces
Secrets management for cross-agent API keys

compute_constraints.sybil_resistance: One registration per wallet enforced at contract level
